title: [MTR4] Low effort LU 2009 Stock
description: Low effort LU 2009 Stock for MTR mod!
body:
# Low effort LU 2009 Stock
Adds the London Underground 2009 Stock, based on London Underground 1995 Stock.
## Version 2 is out now! This update includes a refreshed model for the train.
![Banner image for LERT 2009 Stock Version 2, showcasing the updated, now MTR4 compatible train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7121bb1b3c6d40a24b6fc090cced8758e3bda2d8.png)
## Features
- The train
- Motor sounds made from CAF-Train
